---
title: "pedigreekit 祖先贡献率测试"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, message=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## 读取测试数据

```{r}
library(pedigreekit)

ped <- read.csv("ped.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
str(ped)

progeny <- ped$ID
sire <- ped$DadID
dam <- ped$MaID
```

## calculate_ancestor_contribution（向量输入，小样本）

全群计算较慢，此处用前 500 个个体做示例。

```{r}
n_sample <- 500
CF_vec <- calculate_ancestor_contribution(
  progeny = progeny,
  sire = sire,
  dam = dam,
  top_k = 999,
  max_depth = 999,
  format = "ratio"
)


CF_mat <- calculate_ancestor_contribution(
  progeny = progeny,
  sire = sire,
  dam = dam,
  top_k = 999,
  max_depth = 999,
  format = "matrix"
)
head(CF_mat)




CF_mat1 <- calculate_ancestor_contribution(
  progeny = progeny,
  sire = sire,
  dam = dam,
  top_k = 999,
  max_depth = 999,
  format = "ratio"
)
head(CF_mat1)
```

## calculate_ancestor_contribution（file 输入，逗号分隔）

从文件读取并计算前若干个体的祖先贡献（全群可改为不取子集，耗时会较长）。

```{r}
CF_file <- calculate_ancestor_contribution(
  file = "ped.csv",
  sep = ",",
  progeny = "ID",
  sire = "DadID",
  dam = "MaID",
  top_k = 5,
  max_depth = 6
)
head(CF_file)
```

## 输出结构说明

- 第一列 `id`：个体 ID  
- 后续列 `anc_1`, `anc_2`, ...：贡献从高到低的祖先 ID  
- 无父母或无法计算时对应列为 `NA`
